params.TriggerDescription: Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control, then proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

params.AddKeyword: Protection from white & Protection from blue
params.Description: Equipped creature gets +2/+2 and has protection from white and from blue.
